charts.title: ✓ Validation PASS — reproduces the paper's behaviour
charts.caption: Topological equilibrium under T=0 annealing
charts.simulations: Validation report card. The PASS/FAIL badge is the result of an automated acceptance test (pbg_cpm_studies.gg1993.validate) evaluated against this study's own reproduced metric time series — not a hand-set verdict. final ⟨n⟩_bulk ≈ 6 (within 0.3) and μ₂ decreases while annealing

charts.title: Fig 2
charts.caption: bulk/total ⟨n⟩ and moments μ₂,μ₃,μ₄ vs MCS during T=0 annealing.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: Bulk <n> converges to ~5.97 within ~2 MCS with total<bulk, reproducing Fig 2; cell walls compact by 2-20 MCS (Fig 3).

charts.title: Fig 3
charts.caption: cell-wall detail: unannealed, 2 MCS, 20 MCS of T=0 annealing.
